title: As the Iran war upends energy flows, Russia is emerging as the real winner
summary_full: Russia is shaping up to be a major beneficiary of the escalating energy crisis in the Persian Gulf, analysts told CNBC.
summary_public: Russia is shaping up to be a major beneficiary of the escalating energy crisis in the Persian Gulf, analysts told CNBC.

RU.label: positive
RU.evidence: Russia is emerging as the real winner
